health.recommended_action: Investigate: (1) windowed KPIs (/performance, /stats pnl24h, /pnl/history) silently dropped real closed trades whose closed_at is epoch-ms — fixed read-side in this PR; writer-side normalise + migration still pending (BL-20260620-RECONCILER-CLOSEDAT-MS). (2) Multiple real bybit_2 BTCUSDT positions ended 'orphaned' via stuck_strategy_watchdog with no realized PnL.

accounts_live.note: Live map: alpaca_paper, breakout_1, bybit_1, bybit_2, ib_paper = true; ib_live/oanda_practice = false. Real-money bybit_2 is live (no dry-flip regression).

vm_health.note: cpu 10%, memory 11.1%, disk 23.5% — comfortable headroom on the 2-OCPU/12GB Ampere box.

signal_pipeline.note: 36 strategies configured; pipeline ticking. No closed trades in 24h (quiet market window), consistent with low realized activity.

kpi_closed_at_window_bug.note: Real bybit_2 BTCUSDT closes were invisible to windowed KPIs: trade #2768 closed 11:37:03Z with pnl +1.30 yet /performance?window=24h returned 0 and /stats pnl24h $0. Root cause: the reconciler-filled close writes closed_at as epoch-ms ('1782128223798'); datetime()/substr() of that yields NULL/garbage so the row fails the window filter. Lifetime totals (no datetime parse) still counted it. Fixed read-side (shared _closed_at.py wired into /performance, /stats, /pnl/history).

real_positions_orphaned.note: 3 real-money bybit_2 BTCUSDT positions (journal ids 2762/2757/2746) ended status='orphaned' via stuck_strategy_watchdog with no exit_price/pnl, though the exchange shows the account flat — so they carry no realized PnL and never count. Plus #2765 closed reconciler_filled with NULL pnl/exit. Investigate why the watchdog orphans real filled positions instead of recording a clean close.

sprint_doc_review.note: No doc drift introduced this window.

performance.recommended_action: Real money had >=1 cleanly-closed trade in the window (#2768 +$1.30) that the KPI bug hid. The broader 24h had ~6 real CLOSE fills on bybit_2 (per the operator's Bybit log) netting ~-$0.92 incl fees; several journal rows are orphaned/NULL-pnl so the true realized picture needs the writer-side closed_at fix + an orphan-pnl backfill.

consolidated.headline: INVESTIGATE. The first report ran clean but UNDER-REPORTED: real-money bybit_2 DID close trades in the window (trade #2768 trend_donchian BTCUSDT +$1.30, closed 11:37Z) — they were hidden by a KPI bug where the reconciler writes closed_at as epoch-ms, which datetime()/substr() drop from every windowed query (/performance, /stats pnl24h, /pnl/history). Found from the operator's Bybit transaction log; fixed read-side in this PR (shared _closed_at.py). Also flagged: 3 real bybit_2 positions ended 'orphaned' via stuck_strategy_watchdog with no realized PnL. System otherwise healthy (clean restart 12:09Z deploy b2b85f37, services up, VM relaxed). Paper book 8 open, lifetime -$31,972 (isolated, large notional). ML fleet nominal. Markets calm: BTC +1.2%, MES +0.5%, MGC +0.7%.

cross_review_notes: Primary cross-domain finding: the 'quiet window / 0 closed trades' read was a DATA-INTEGRITY artifact, not market reality. Health (DB validity) + performance (trade KPIs) both depend on the close-time basis; an epoch-ms closed_at broke the windowed SQL in /performance, /stats pnl24h and /pnl/history identically, while /trades/closed (already guarded) would have shown them.
The clean 12:09Z restart is unrelated — trade #2768 was already closed (11:37Z) before it; the KPI bug, not restart timing, hid it.
Open paper book (no real exposure): SOLUSDT long +$350, AVAXUSDT short -$478; XRP×2/ADA×2 legs show identical per-leg uPnL (per-symbol broker aggregate).

real.note: In-window real close: trade #2768 trend_donchian BTCUSDT long, opened 07:15Z closed 11:37Z, +$1.30 (matches the Bybit log's +1.41 Change before the journal's fee basis). Was hidden by the closed_at KPI bug. 24h also saw real CLOSE fills at 04:00Z and 20:41Z (prior window) + 3 orphaned real positions.
